style_defaults.period_reference: 2010s aviation/news explainer captioning: neutral modern sans, not retro CRT, newsreel, or amber brand-title treatment

caption_segments.text: The 737 MAX was sold as a
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: familiar airplane.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: That was the commercial promise.
Airlines could keep crews, schedules, and
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: training close to the old 737.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: Then Boeing put larger CFM Leap engines
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: on the aircraft.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: They sat farther forward and higher on
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: the wing, and under certain high angle
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: of attack conditions, the jet could pitch
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: up differently.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: MCAS was built to make that new
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: behavior feel familiar, but the system could
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: move the stabilizer from one angle of
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: attack sensor.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: Pilots were not clearly trained that it
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: existed by name.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: After Lionair 610, the warning still was
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: not reclassified fast enough as an architectural
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: problem.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: The plane had changed.
The story told to the people flying
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: it had not.
caption_segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

caption_segments.text: Small causes, massive consequences.
